talents.name: Cold Intent - Sharp
talents.desc: Max Ice Energy +10. Special Attack DMG +12%.

talents.name: Intellect Conversion
talents.desc: Every 10 Intellect grants 1 MATK.

talents.name: Frost Curse Sigil
talents.desc: When a Special Attack deals DMG, it has a fixed 5% chance to Frozen the target.

talents.name: Ice Revelation
talents.desc: Summons 2 permanent Ice Crystal Cores that float beside you. Ice Crystal Core When Basic Attacks deal DMG, Ice Crystal Cores have a fixed 10% chance to fire 2 Ice Arrows. Ice Arrow: Each arrow deals Magic Damage equal to 28% ATK to the target and grants 1 Frost Crystal (up to 2 Frost Crystals can be stored).

talents.name: Breath of Frost
talents.desc: Frost Crystal cap +1.

talents.name: Tide Mastery
talents.desc: While casting Frostbeam, you can channel Tidepool.

talents.name: Crystal Resonance
talents.desc: When Frostbeam deals DMG, it has a 30% fixed chance to make Ice Crystal Core fire an Ice Arrow. Up to 1 Ice Arrow can be fired every 0.5s. The final DMG of the Ice Arrow is doubled.

talents.name: Frost Explosion
talents.desc: Ice Arrows fired by Ice Crystal Cores deal an additional instance of AoE Magic Damage equal to 28% ATK.

talents.name: Ice Crystal Expansion
talents.desc: Max Ice Energy +40.

talents.name: Ice Shard Pact
talents.desc: Increases Maelstrom's Ice Energy recovery rate by 200%.

talents.name: Cold Wind Convergence
talents.desc: When Frozen Gale hits a target (only triggers once when hitting multiple targets), it consumes all Frost Crystals to summon Icy Bolt, with the number of Icy Bolt equal to the consumed Frost Crystals. Icy Bolt deals DMG, restores 5 Ice Energy, and reduces the Ice Energy cost of skills by 3% for the next 15s, stacking up to 6 times.

talents.name: Frostbeam Spec
talents.desc: Replaces Special Attack with ​Frostbeam​ and enhances the skill. Every Frost Crystal increases ​Frostbeam​ DMG by 15%. Each 10% Mastery grants an additional 0.85% DMG bonus (up to 5%) and increases the Ice Energy consumed by 30%. When ​Frostbeam​ hits a target, every 13 hits reduce the remaining CD of Permafrostby 1s (hitting multiple targets only counts once). Consumes Ice Energy to channel Frostbeam continuously at the target. High Haste and Mastery greatly speed up its channeling while improving Ice Energy recovery.

talents.name: Snow Shadow
talents.desc: For every 25 Ice Energy consumed, the CD of Crystal Veil -1s.

talents.name: Frost Comet
talents.desc: When Frost Lance that consumes Frost Crystals deals DMG, there is a fixed 21% chance to summon Frost Comet.

talents.name: Frozen Stars
talents.desc: When Frost Lance triggers both a Crit and a Lucky Strike, Meteor Storm's CD is immediately reset. If Meteor Storm is already off cooldown, it will be automatically cast (but this Meteor Storm will deal half damage).

talents.name: Blizzard Dual Spears
talents.desc: Within 8s after casting Blizzard, Frost Lance can fire an additional Frost Lance at another target near the original one.

talents.name: Stormy Encounter
talents.desc: When Crystal Veil deals DMG, it has a fixed chance to reduce the CD of Blizzard by 1s. The chance equals half percentage of your Luck.

talents.name: Shattering Strike
talents.desc: When Meteor Storm deals DMG, it causes Ice Crystal Cores to fire Ice Arrows. This effect can trigger up to once per Meteor Storm cast.

talents.name: Glacier fury
talents.desc: Consuming 15 Frost Crystals enhances the next Blizzard. Blizzard: Bypasses the casting time and increases DMG dealt by 30%, and trigger Lucky Strike.

talents.name: Icicle Volley
talents.desc: For every 10 casts of Frost Lance, a Piercing Ice Spear is launched forward.

talents.name: Glazed Vastness
talents.desc: Ice skills deal 8% more DMG to Elites and stronger targets.

talents.name: Continuous Stream
talents.desc: Dealing DMG triggers Trickle. Trickle: Grants a 1% Ice damage bonus for 6s, stacking up to 5 times.

talents.name: Boundless Frost
talents.desc: Every 50 Ice Energy consumed grants 1 Frost Crystal. Max Frost Crystal +3. Each possessed Frost Crystal increases Frostbeam DMG by 5%.

talents.name: Frost Shock
talents.desc: When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate lands a Lucky Strike, it has a fixed 30% chance to trigger Frost Shock, once every 3s.

talents.name: Quick Frozen Blast
talents.desc: When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate deals DMG to a target with Frozen, it triggers Frost Shock, once per second.

talents.name: Icy Calm
talents.desc: Each additional target hit by an Expertise Skill or Ultimate grants a 2% bonus to your highest stat among Mastery, Haste, Crit, or Luck for 5s. Hitting more than 5 additional targets still only counts as 5.

talents.name: Instant Cooling
talents.desc: Every 35 Ice Energy consumed reduces the remaining CD of Meteor Storm and Frozen Gale by 1.3s.

talents.name: Cold Stream
talents.desc: Max Ice Energy +25. Every 1% Haste increases Ice Energy's auto REG SPD by 1%.

talents.name: Frostjade Staff
talents.desc: When Ice Arrow cast with Ice Crystal Core deals DMG, restores 1 Ice Energy. In the Permafrost status, the recovery doubles.

talents.name: Icicle Spec
talents.desc: Further enhances Frost Lance. When Frost Lance deals Crit DMG, there is a fixed 30% chance for Ice Crystal Cores to fire Ice Arrows. Time your use of Ice Energy to chant and launch Frost Lance. Crit and Luck increase the chance to skip chanting and significantly boost the lance's DMG.

talents.name: Frost Domain
talents.desc: The area of Glacier Hymn -50%. While within the domain, you gain a 25% Ice bonus.

talents.name: Cold Pulse
talents.desc: Every 50 hits by Frostbeam trigger a Cold Pulse. For each additional enemy hit, increases Cold Pulse DMG by 20%, up to 500%.

talents.name: Intellect Cooling
talents.desc: When Intellect reaches 300, skill CD -10%.

talents.name: Secondary Amp
talents.desc: Boost the highest stat among the following 5 stats: Crit, Haste, Luck, Mastery, and Versatility by 3.5% as a final value.

talents.name: Cold Intent - Flow
talents.desc: Ice Energy cap +40. Special Attack damage +4%.

talents.name: Ice Comet
talents.desc: When Intellect reaches 500, gain 5% Ice bonus.

talents.name: Endless Cold
talents.desc: Every 20 Frost Crystals consumed grants Endless Cold effect. Endless Cold: For 10s, increases Meteor Storm DMG by 150%, and removes its CD and Ice Energy cost. During this period, Ice Arrows triggered by Meteor Storm cannot produce Frost Crystal. When Endless Cold is triggered during Permafrost, enter the Endless Cold state after the effect of Permafrost ends. If the number of Frost Crystals consumed during this period exceeds 20, proportionally increase the final damage dealt by Meteor Storm (up to 100%).

talents.name: Frost Lance Barrage
talents.desc: During Permafrost, Frost Lance fires 2 consecutive shots.

talents.name: Freezing Meteor Storm
talents.desc: When Meteor Storm deals damage, 20% chance to apply Frozen to the target. Throughout the duration of Permafrost, when Frost Lance and Meteor Storm critically hit, extends the duration of Permafrost by 0.5s, up to 5s of extension.

talents.name: Energy Saving
talents.desc: When consuming Frost Crystal to cast Frost Lance, refunds 50% of the Ice Energy consumed after the cast. When casting Frost Lance without consuming Frost Crystal, an additional 50% of the Frost Energy consumed is deducted after the cast.

talents.name: Frost Blade
talents.desc: Frost Lances that consume Frost Crystal deal 20% more DMG.

talents.name: Deep Cold Magic Spear
talents.desc: Frost Lance deals 70% more DMG. Frost Lance costs 100% more time to use.

talents.name: Meteor Storm Expansion
talents.desc: Meteor Storm hit count +1. Meteor Storm gains 10% Ice Bonus.

talents.name: Frost Lance Crit
talents.desc: Frost Lance deals 1.5% more Crit DMG. The effect lasts 6s and stacks up to 10 times.

talents.name: Infusion Sublimation
talents.desc: Increases Max Frost Crystal by 1. During Permafrost, Ice ATK increases by 150. When Permafrost ends, your Frost Crystal resets to the amount you had before the activation of Permafrost.

talents.name: Deadly Frost Lance
talents.desc: Frost Lance deals 20% more DMG to targets with HP less than 35%

talents.name: Critical Cold
talents.desc: During Permafrost, increases Crit DMG dealt by 15%. During Permafrost, increases allies' critical rate by 3%.

talents.name: Bitter Cold
talents.desc: Every 150 Intellect grants 0.5 bonus Crit DMG.

talents.name: Sharp Blizzard
talents.desc: Increases the critical rate of Blizzard by 50%. Increases the Crit DMG of Blizzard by 15%.

talents.name: Frost Crystal Empowerment
talents.desc: Each Frost Crystal consumed increases Intellect by 40. This effect lasts 10s and stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Frost Assault
talents.desc: Blizzard reduces the Ice Resistance of targets hit by 10%. The effect lasts 10s and does not stack, and only works on your own.

talents.name: Luck Damage
talents.desc: Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +15%. Every 2% Luck grants 1% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.

talents.name: Cold Retention
talents.desc: In the Permafrost status, the cost of Frostbeam decreases by 25%.

talents.name: Frost Revelation
talents.desc: The first hit of Tidepool on the target grants 5 Ice Energy. Each additional Frost Crystal increases Ice Energy restored by 10.

talents.name: Law of Energy Surge
talents.desc: Every 50 Ice Arrows shot increases the DMG of your next Frozen Gale by 200% for 30s. Additionally, casting Frozen Gale grants the Law of Energy Surge.

talents.name: Power of Ice Crystals
talents.desc: When Ice Energy is above 50%, deals 8% more Ice damage.

talents.name: Ice Crystal Recovery
talents.desc: When Ice Energy is below 50%, enhances the recovery rate of Ice Energy by 10%.

talents.name: Rapid Ice Arrow
talents.desc: During Permafrost, Frostbeam fires 2 additional Ice Arrows generated by Ice Crystal Core. However, during Permafrost, Lucky Strike's final damage is reduced by 50%.

talents.name: Endless Tide
talents.desc: During Permafrost, each Ice Arrow triggered by Ice Crystal Core extends the duration of Permafrost by 0.5s, up to 5s.

talents.name: Frost Tide
talents.desc: When dealing DMG, Frostbeam has a fixed 20% chance to grant Frost Crystal. If Max Frost Crystal is reached, grants 5% bonus Ice damage dealt instead for 3s.

talents.name: Ray Mastery I
talents.desc: Frostbeam deals 2% more Ice damage. Frostbeam deals 5% more Ice damage to the main target.

talents.name: Wide Area Ice Arrow
talents.desc: Every 15 hits of Expertise Skill allows Ice Crystal Core to fire Ice Arrow.

talents.name: Intellect Ice Crystal
talents.desc: Every 50 Intellect grants 1 Max Ice Energy, up to 100 from this source.

talents.name: Quick Chant
talents.desc: Increases Haste by 1000. During Permafrost, Cast Speed increases by 15%.

talents.name: Sharp Ice Arrow
talents.desc: Increases the critical rate of Ice Arrows from Ice Crystal Core by 50%. Increases the Crit DMG of Ice Arrows from Ice Crystal Core by 10%.

talents.name: Ray's Swan Song
talents.desc: When dealing DMG, Frostbeam gains a fixed 10% chance to double Mastery for 3s (which can only be triggers once on multiple hits).

talents.name: Ice Crystal Expansion
talents.desc: Max Ice Energy +40.

talents.name: Intellect Amp
talents.desc: Increases Intellect by 5%.
